title: GUI Recorder
description: Simple recorder for actions in any GUIs.
body:
[![Discord link to the "LopyMine's Project" discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21f178aff2b64844fefeaf94a3a3a418440fd43f.png)](https://discord.gg/NZzxdkrV4s) [![Github Link-Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d87060a9e4522786e45b4b54d10853a1b4a91b10.png)](https://github.com/LopyMine/GUI-Recorder) [![Support Link-Banner [Boosty]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dce91fef079649dee277c52a998fc068e745e99e.png)](https://boosty.to/lopymine/donate) [![CurseForge Link-Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c39affcb732c8b1a4fe189e79898c686da3d63e2.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gui-recorder) [![Modrinth Link-Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9991553f6a20e5105b9b153b8d817bc3630c18a8.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gui-recorder) # 📑 Description A Simple Fabric Mod that allows you to record the game GUI separately, i.e. having a transparent background! All records are saved to the `.minecraft/gui-recorder` folder. You can also save last recording frames for manual processing, for this enable "Create Backup For Last Frames" in the mod configuration screen. After finishing recording, last frames will be copied to `.minecraft/gui-recorder-latest-backup`. ### You can also: - Disable some GUI elements from being captured - Crop rendering area - Take screenshots - Record in any formats (which allow FFMpeg) And yeah, **it requires FFMpeg installed!** # 📹 Showcase ![Showcase](https://github.com/LopyMine/Profile/blob/main/files/showcase.webp?raw=true)
Result Webp (Compressed for this readme) ![Showcase Result](https://github.com/LopyMine/Profile/blob/main/files/showcase_result.webp?raw=true)
# 🎮 Keybinds To use this mod you will need to bind some keys, just keeping you informed 😉
